title: dolicholus macrocarpus
intro: Dolicholus macrocarpus, also known as the horse purse, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dolicholus macrocarpus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
